description: Per-page rich SEO/AEO content enrichment progress for the Growthify docs site. Resumable across sessions. Each batch raises a category's pages to the per-page-uniqueness floor (1000+ unique words, definition-first intro, 5-8 FAQ, distinct title/meta).
categoryStrategy: ONE category per batch. Pick the next category with the most unenriched pages; cover the highest-search-demand pages first.

batches.notes: Initial scaffold: 26 documentation pages created from the real Growthify code (16 modules, 52 admin features, 72 theme blocks, 50 storefront APIs, billing tiers, webhooks). Each page has a distinct title + meta description + definition-first intro + an FAQ block. SEO floor in place: robots.txt AI-bot allowlist, sitemap.xml (Docusaurus), llms.txt, JSON-LD (WebSite + Organization + SoftwareApplication), per-page OG/meta. Future batches deepen each page toward the 1000+ word floor and add HowTo/FAQPage JSON-LD where useful.

nextBatchSuggestion.rationale: Modules are the highest-search-demand pages (shopify popups, reviews, bundles, cart upsell). Deepen the 13 module pages first to the 1000+ word floor with concrete use cases, comparisons, and 5-8 FAQ entries each.
nextBatchSuggestion.verifyBeforeUse: yarn build must stay green; keep titles/meta distinct across all pages.

qualityGates: 1000+ unique words per page (no shared boilerplate)
definition-first intro (first sentence is a literal definition)
honest framing on limits (what each module does NOT do)
